Welcome to LorenaNewsApp’s documentation!¶

Database models for the LorenasGossip application. Defines CustomUser, Article, and Newsletter. Publisher is a CustomUser with role=’publisher’.

Modules:

  • CustomUser: Extended user model with role-based access.

  • Article: News article written by a journalist.

  • Newsletter: Curated collection of approved articles.

class LorenasGossip.models.Article(*args, **kwargs)¶

A news article written by a journalist. Can be independent or published under a publisher. The publisher field links to a CustomUser with role=’publisher’.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class LorenasGossip.models.CustomUser(*args, **kwargs)¶

Extended user model with role-based fields.

Roles: reader, journalist, editor, publisher.

Readers can view articles and subscribe to journalists/publishers. Journalists can write articles and newsletters. Editors can approve and delete articles. Publishers manage a team of journalists and editors.

Reader fields (subscriptions) are cleared for non-readers. Journalist/Editor fields are cleared for non-journalists/editors.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
get_publishers()¶

Return all publishers this journalist/editor belongs to. Works via reverse relation from publisher’s team fields.

property is_editor¶

Return True if user is an editor.

property is_journalist¶

Return True if user is a journalist.

property is_publisher¶

Return True if user is a publisher.

property is_reader¶

Return True if user is a reader.

save(*args, **kwargs)¶

Auto-assign user to the correct group on save.

class LorenasGossip.models.Newsletter(*args, **kwargs)¶

A curated collection of articles created by a journalist.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶

Views for the LorenasGossip application. Handles authentication, articles, newsletters, publisher profiles, and team management.

All views use Django’s login_required decorator. Role-based access is enforced via custom decorators defined in decorators.py.

LorenasGossip.views.approve_article(request, pk)¶

Approve an article (editors only).

LorenasGossip.views.article_create(request)¶

Create a new article (journalists only).

LorenasGossip.views.article_delete(request, pk)¶

Delete an article (editors and journalists).

LorenasGossip.views.article_detail(request, pk)¶

Display a single article.

LorenasGossip.views.article_edit(request, pk)¶

Edit an existing article (editors and journalists).

LorenasGossip.views.article_list(request)¶

Display all approved articles.

LorenasGossip.views.join_publisher(request, pk)¶

Journalist or editor requests to join a publisher’s team. Publisher can remove them from the team via publisher_team view.

LorenasGossip.views.leave_publisher(request, pk)¶

Journalist or editor leaves a publisher’s team.

LorenasGossip.views.login_view(request)¶

Login an existing user.

LorenasGossip.views.logout_view(request)¶

Logout the current user.

LorenasGossip.views.newsletter_create(request)¶

Create a new newsletter (journalists only).

LorenasGossip.views.newsletter_delete(request, pk)¶

Delete a newsletter (editors and journalists).

LorenasGossip.views.newsletter_detail(request, pk)¶

Display a single newsletter.

LorenasGossip.views.newsletter_edit(request, pk)¶

Edit a newsletter (editors and journalists).

LorenasGossip.views.newsletter_list(request)¶

Display all newsletters.

LorenasGossip.views.pending_articles(request)¶

List all articles pending approval (editors only).

LorenasGossip.views.publisher_detail(request, pk)¶

Display a publisher’s profile, team, and articles.

LorenasGossip.views.publisher_list(request)¶

Display all publishers.

LorenasGossip.views.publisher_team(request, pk)¶

Publisher manages their team of journalists and editors. Only the publisher themselves can access this page.

LorenasGossip.views.register_view(request)¶

Register a new user and assign them to the correct group.

LorenasGossip.views.username_recovery(request)¶

Allow users to recover their username via email. Displays the username associated with the provided email.

Forms for the LorenasGossip application. Handles registration, article/newsletter creation, and publisher team management.

All forms include custom validation methods (clean_*) to enforce business rules before saving to the database.

class LorenasGossip.forms.ArticleForm(*args, user=None, **kwargs)¶

Form for creating and editing articles with validation.

class Meta¶

Meta options for ArticleForm.

model¶

alias of Article

clean_content()¶

Validate article content length.

clean_title()¶

Validate article title length.

property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

class LorenasGossip.forms.NewsletterForm(data=None, files=None, auto_id='id_%s', prefix=None, initial=None, error_class=<class 'django.forms.utils.ErrorList'>, label_suffix=None, empty_permitted=False, instance=None, use_required_attribute=None, renderer=None)¶

Form for creating and editing newsletters with validation.

class Meta¶

Meta options for NewsletterForm.

model¶

alias of Newsletter

clean_articles()¶

Validate that only approved articles are included.

clean_title()¶

Validate newsletter title length.

property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

class LorenasGossip.forms.PublisherTeamForm(data=None, files=None, auto_id='id_%s', prefix=None, initial=None, error_class=<class 'django.forms.utils.ErrorList'>, label_suffix=None, empty_permitted=False, instance=None, use_required_attribute=None, renderer=None)¶

Form for publishers to manage their team. Allows selecting journalists and editors.

class Meta¶

Meta options for PublisherTeamForm.

model¶

alias of CustomUser

property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

class LorenasGossip.forms.RegisterForm(*args, **kwargs)¶

Registration form with role selection and validation.

class Meta¶

Meta options for RegisterForm.

model¶

alias of CustomUser

clean_email()¶

Validate that email is not already in use.

clean_role()¶

Validate that the selected role is valid.

clean_username()¶

Validate that username is long enough.

property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

save(commit=True)¶

Save user and trigger group assignment.
